title: Cobblemon Chat Icons
description: Replace some emojis with Cobblemon Type Icons
body:
# Cobblemon Type Emoji Icons
![types-to-emojis](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ce4b08d5756403914b4b2858381814dede21050.png)

## Description
- This pack replaces standard emojis with **Cobblemon Type Icons**.
- Works in chat, item name and GUIs
- This resource pack **Does NOT require the Cobblemon mod** to work

### How to use
**Windows users:**
Press `Win + .` to open the emoji picker and search for the desired emoji:
![windows-emoji-picker](https://i.imgur.com/EfPBuJR.gif)

**Other platforms:**
You can simply copy and paste the emojis from the list below:
```
Type / Emoji

Normal: 🔳
Fire: 🔥 
Water: 💧 
Grass: 🍃 
Electric: ⚡ 
Ice: ❄ 
Fighting: 🥊 
Poison: ☢ 
Ground: ⛰ 
Flying: 🌫 
Psychic: 🔮 
Bug: 🐛 
Rock: 🗻 
Ghost: 👻 
Dragon: 🐉 
Dark: 🌑 
Steel: ⚙ 
Fairy: ✨ 
```

### Type Icons in Player Names
![types-in-name](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e57ba2dd8a15b3c203f305f93fc2875f077a0d9.png)

You can display Cobblemon Type icons directly in a player’s name using Minecraft teams command:
```
/team add NAME
/team modify NAME prefix "🔥 "
/team join NAME @s
```


### Know issues
- Currently, emojis don't show up on signs and in books.
